download.heroSubtitle: Trusted by over 50 million users across 190+ countries. Secure transactions, multilingual support, and multi-currency settlement make global pre-owned trading easier.
download.featureGlobalDesc: 190+ countries, multilingual & multi-currency, seamless cross-border transactions
download.featureSecurityDesc: Bank-grade encryption, buyer protection program, full transaction coverage
download.featureSpeedDesc: Smart recommendations, quick search, one-click listing for efficient trading
download.featureChatDesc: Built-in messaging for real-time buyer-seller communication and bargaining
download.featurePaymentDesc: Credit cards, bank transfers, and more payment methods for safe settlements
download.featureRewardDesc: Daily login rewards, points exchange, referral bonuses, and more benefits
download.review1: Been using it for over 6 months and it's amazing! Found several limited edition bags at much better prices than retail. The seller verification system gives me great peace of mind. Highly recommend for pre-owned lovers!
download.review2: Using it from Japan. The multilingual support is incredibly convenient, and I can safely purchase items from overseas. Customer support is prompt and courteous.
download.review3: As a seller, TURNSY's listing process is super easy - just upload photos and it auto-fills item details. Order management is clear and customer communication is smooth. Already sold over 50 items!
download.review4: Beautiful interface design and smooth operation. Buyer protection gives me confidence while shopping. My only suggestion is to add more filter options for easier searching.
download.review5: Was using other platforms before, but after a friend recommended TURNSY I never looked back. The daily check-in and points system is fun too - always redeeming coupons. App loads fast with no lag.
download.review6: Multi-currency settlement is so convenient! I frequently buy pre-owned items from Japan and Europe, and the automatic exchange rate conversion saves a lot of hassle. Payment process is secure with multiple options.
download.securityEscrowDesc: Funds held by platform after payment, released to seller only after buyer confirms receipt
download.securityVerifyDesc: Sellers undergo strict identity verification for trustworthy transactions
download.securityEncryptDesc: 256-bit SSL encryption protects personal information and transaction data
download.securitySupportDesc: Professional support team available 24/7 with quick dispute resolution
download.ctaDesc: Join 50 million users worldwide and start your pre-owned trading journey
